description_long: This is a modern, sporty police car with a sleek, aerodynamic body painted in a high-contrast black and white color scheme. The vehicle features a prominent roof-mounted light bar with red and blue emergency lights, and its headlights are large and slightly rounded, with one appearing yellow-tinted. The car has four doors, silver alloy wheels, and tinted windows, giving it a high-performance appearance. Subtle police markings are visible on the doors, including a white stripe and a stylized emblem. The rear of the car is equipped with red taillights and a visible exhaust, while the front displays additional emergency lights integrated into the grille. The overall design suggests a pursuit or patrol vehicle suitable for urban environments.
description: A sleek black and white police car with a roof-mounted red and blue light bar, alloy wheels, and subtle police markings on the doors.
description_view_0: Side view showing the black and white paint scheme, police markings on the door, tinted windows, and the roof-mounted light bar.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the headlights (one yellow-tinted), grille-mounted emergency lights, and the full width of the roof light bar.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the police markings and the light bar from a different angle.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the red taillights, rear window, exhaust, and the roof light bar from behind.
attribute_police_markings: White stylized markings resembling stripes or insignia are visible on the doors, but no clear text such as 'POLICE' or department names are present.
attribute_emergency_lights: A roof-mounted light bar with red and blue lights is present, spanning the width of the roof. Additional small emergency lights are integrated into the front grille.
